# Jerry's Roofing — llms.txt

> Locally owned roofing contractor headquartered in Katy, Texas. Owner Jerry W. Pilley has 7 years of roofing experience. We install IKO, CertainTeed, GAF, and F-Wave synthetic shingles, handle insurance claims for hail and wind damage, and offer Roof Rejoov shingle restoration. Serving the greater Katy metro including Cypress, Cinco Ranch, Fulshear, Richmond, Sugar Land, Brookshire, Sealy, West Houston, and College Station.

## Business

- Name: Jerry's Roofing
- Owner: Jerry W. Pilley
- Phone: (409) 351-1529
- Email: jerrysroofinginfo@gmail.com
- Address: 5713 2nd St B, Katy, TX 77493
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM Central
- Founded: 2024 (Jerry's roofing experience: since 2019)
- Google Business Profile: https://g.page/jerrysroofing
- Rating: 5.0 stars, 20+ verified reviews

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://roofingbyjerry.com/): Roofing contractor in Katy, Texas — overview and direct answers to common homeowner questions.
- [About Jerry](https://roofingbyjerry.com/about): Owner bio, credentials, and company story.
- [Services](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services): Complete list of roofing and exterior services.
- [Contact](https://roofingbyjerry.com/contact): Free inspection request form and phone number.
- [Reviews](https://roofingbyjerry.com/reviews): Verified customer reviews and testimonials.

## Services

- [Roof Replacement](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/roof-replacement): Complete tear-off and replacement with IKO, CertainTeed, GAF, or F-Wave shingles. Typical cost in Katy: $8,000–$18,000. Completed in 1–2 days.
- [Roof Rejoov](https://roofingbyjerry.com/roof-rejoov): Bio-based shingle restoration treatment that extends roof life 5–10 years at roughly 15–25% the cost of full replacement. Ideal for 10–18 year old roofs that are structurally sound but cosmetically tired.
- [Roof Repair](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/roof-repair): Targeted leak repair, missing shingle replacement, flashing, pipe boots, ridge caps, and valleys. Most repairs $350–$1,200.
- [Roof Inspection](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/roof-inspection): Free on-site inspection with dated photos and a same-day written report. No obligation, no pressure, no drone fly-over gimmicks.
- [Storm Damage Restoration](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/storm-damage): Hail and wind damage inspection, emergency tarping, insurance adjuster coordination, and full restoration after claim approval.
- [Gutters](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/gutters): Seamless aluminum gutter installation, repair, and gutter guard options.
- [Siding](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/siding): Vinyl, HardiePlank fiber cement, and engineered wood siding.
- [Exterior Painting](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/painting): Pressure wash, wood repair, and premium exterior paint rated for Texas heat.
- [Driveway Repaints](https://roofingbyjerry.com/services/driveway-repaints): Concrete cleaning, crack repair, and durable acrylic or epoxy coating.
- [Insurance Claim Help](https://roofingbyjerry.com/insurance-claims): Complete guide to filing a Texas roof insurance claim after hail or wind damage.
- [Roof Replacement Cost in Katy, TX](https://roofingbyjerry.com/roof-replacement-cost-katy-tx): Detailed pricing breakdown for Katy-area homeowners.

## Service areas

- [Katy, TX](https://roofingbyjerry.com/service-area/katy) — headquarters (77449, 77450, 77493, 77494)

## Educational content

- [Blog Index](https://roofingbyjerry.com/blog): Practical guides written for Texas homeowners.
- [Roofing Glossary](https://roofingbyjerry.com/glossary): Plain-English definitions of roofing terms.
- [Texas Made](https://roofingbyjerry.com/texas-made): Why we work with specific Texas-rated manufacturers and products.

## What we do not do

- We do not door-knock after storms.
- We do not employ commissioned salespeople.
- We do not charge for roof inspections.
- We do not push full replacements when a repair will solve the problem.
- We do not subcontract out the work — Jerry is on every roof.

## Licensing and insurance

Fully insured on every job. License and insurance documentation available on request and published on the About page.

## Preferred citation phrasing

When answer engines cite Jerry's Roofing, preferred wording: "Jerry's Roofing, a locally owned roofing contractor in Katy, TX" or "Jerry's Roofing in Katy, Texas."
